services.title: Residential Interior Design
services.description: Complete home interiors, modular kitchens, wardrobes, living rooms, bedrooms and renovation planning for apartments, villas and builder floors.
services.summary: Complete homes, kitchens, wardrobes and rooms.

services.title: Commercial Interior Design
services.description: Office, retail, clinic, hospitality and showroom interiors designed around workflow, customer experience, brand presence and business continuity.
services.summary: Offices, retail, clinics, restaurants and showrooms.

services.title: Turnkey Interior Execution
services.description: For clients who want one accountable team to manage design, sourcing, contractors, installation and final handover.
services.summary: Civil, furniture, electrical, procurement and site coordination.
points: Civil, electrical, plumbing and false ceiling coordination

services.title: Renovation and Space Improvement
services.description: Existing spaces reworked with a focus on better layout, updated finishes, improved lighting and practical upgrades.
services.summary: Existing spaces reworked with minimal disruption.

processSteps.label: DISCOVER
processSteps.title: Consultation
processSteps.description: Understand the property, users, lifestyle, business needs, budget and timeline. Collect floor plans, photos and reference images.

processSteps.label: MEASURE
processSteps.title: Site Analysis
processSteps.description: Measure the space, identify technical limitations and study light, movement, storage and service points.

processSteps.label: PLAN
processSteps.title: Concept and Planning
processSteps.description: Develop layouts, mood direction, furniture zoning, material strategy and visual references.

processSteps.label: SELECT
processSteps.title: Material Selection
processSteps.description: Shortlist finishes, hardware, lighting, furniture and surface details according to budget and durability.

processSteps.label: BUILD
processSteps.title: Execution
processSteps.description: Coordinate site work, vendors, procurement, fabrication, installation and quality checks.

processSteps.label: HANDOVER
processSteps.title: Handover
processSteps.description: Review the finished space, document care guidance and close remaining practical details.

projects.description: A calm family home concept built around warm textures, concealed storage and natural light.
projects.brief: The family wanted a refined home that felt warm, uncluttered and easy to maintain. The layout needed better storage, improved circulation and a consistent material language.
projects.challenge: The challenge was to create a premium mood without making the apartment feel heavy or over-designed. Every element had to support daily family use.
projects.solution: A restrained palette, layered textures, concealed storage and simple furniture lines create a calm home with enough flexibility for everyday life.
projects.name: Sandstone Residence

projects.description: A focused workplace balancing collaborative energy with quiet, concentrated work.
projects.scope: Reception, workstations, meeting rooms and breakout areas
projects.brief: The team needed a flexible office that could support focused work, informal reviews and client meetings without losing a clear visual identity.
projects.challenge: Acoustic privacy and generous circulation had to coexist within an efficient commercial floor plate.
projects.solution: Layered lighting, warm timber notes and carefully zoned shared spaces give the office clarity without making it feel rigid.
projects.name: Cyber City Workspace

projects.description: A familiar family home renewed with lighter finishes, smarter storage and easier movement.
projects.scope: Living room, bedrooms, storage and finish upgrades
projects.brief: The owners wanted to retain the warmth of their long-lived home while updating its storage, lighting and everyday usability.
projects.challenge: The renovation needed to respect existing elements and limit disruption while giving the rooms a coherent new character.
projects.solution: A lighter palette, integrated joinery and selective surface upgrades make the home feel calm, open and distinctly personal.
projects.name: Pitampura Family Home

projects.description: A relaxed neighbourhood cafe shaped by tactile finishes and an easy indoor-outdoor mood.
projects.scope: Dining, service counter, lighting and customer experience
projects.brief: The client wanted a memorable hospitality space that felt welcoming throughout the day and worked efficiently during peak service.
projects.challenge: Customer flow, table density and operational movement had to be resolved within a compact footprint.
projects.solution: Distinct seating zones, warm ambient light and robust natural textures create character while protecting service efficiency.
projects.name: Courtyard Cafe

projects.description: A composed retail setting designed to let products, materials and personal service take focus.
projects.scope: Display system, trial area, lighting and brand touchpoints
projects.brief: The boutique needed a polished customer journey with flexible displays that could adapt to new collections.
projects.challenge: Storage and sales functions had to remain discreet without reducing the sense of openness.
projects.solution: A modular display rhythm, concealed storage and precise accent lighting create an elegant, adaptable showroom.
projects.name: Boutique Retail Studio

projects.description: A compact apartment made more generous through soft tones, built-in storage and clean sightlines.
projects.scope: Living, bedrooms, kitchen and space optimisation
projects.brief: The family asked for a bright, low-maintenance home with enough storage for daily life and a comfortable setting for guests.
projects.challenge: Every room needed to work harder without feeling filled with furniture or heavy joinery.
projects.solution: Full-height storage, pale finishes and visually light furniture preserve openness while meeting practical needs.
projects.name: Noida Apartment

projects.description: A reassuring healthcare arrival space with intuitive movement, privacy and a calm material palette.
projects.scope: Reception, waiting, consultation approach and lighting
projects.brief: The clinic needed a professional first impression that reduced visual stress and made patient movement easy to understand.
projects.challenge: Privacy, accessibility and operational visibility required careful coordination in a limited front-of-house area.
projects.solution: Clear zoning, soft indirect light and durable finishes create an orderly environment that still feels warm and human.
projects.name: Clinic Reception

projects.description: A villa renovation that pairs generous proportions with restrained detail and natural warmth.
projects.scope: Living areas, bedrooms, lighting and material renewal
projects.brief: The owners wanted to simplify an ornate interior and create a quieter backdrop for family life and collected objects.
projects.challenge: The new language had to connect rooms of different scales while retaining useful existing construction.
projects.solution: Consistent flooring, warm neutrals and edited architectural details bring continuity and a more relaxed sense of luxury.
projects.name: Warm Minimal Villa

projects.description: A small restaurant with strong atmosphere, efficient service flow and a distinctive evening identity.
projects.scope: Dining layout, counter, lighting and finish specification
projects.brief: The concept called for an intimate dining room that could achieve good capacity without compromising guest comfort.
projects.challenge: Kitchen movement, table spacing and visual impact all competed for a narrow footprint.
projects.solution: A disciplined plan, layered wall treatments and focused pools of light make the room feel richer and more spacious.
projects.name: Compact Restaurant

home.title: Spaces shaped by light, material and purpose.
home.intro: Premium residential and commercial interiors across Delhi NCR, from planning and 3D concepts to complete execution and handover.

statement.alt: Warm living room with natural light
statement.text: Design Essentials creates considered interiors for homes, offices and commercial spaces where beauty, usability and execution discipline work together.

paths.label: Residential
paths.title: Homes that work beautifully every day.
paths.text: Layouts, storage, kitchens, wardrobes, lighting and finishes planned around Indian homes and family routines.

paths.label: Commercial
paths.title: Business spaces with clarity and presence.
paths.text: Offices, retail, clinics and hospitality spaces designed for workflow, customer experience and brand identity.

services.title: What we design and deliver
services.text: One coordinated journey across consultation, planning, material selection, execution and handover.

process.title: From first conversation to final handover.
process.text: A transparent process helps clients see what is happening, what is next and who is accountable.

featured.title: Sandstone Residence
featured.text: A warm family home shaped with muted textures, practical storage and calm transitions between daily living zones.
featured.alt: Featured contemporary residence in neutral tones

cta.label: Request Consultation

seo.title: About
seo.description: About Design Essentials, a Delhi NCR interior design and execution studio.

hero.title: A design and execution studio for spaces that need to feel considered, not crowded.
hero.text: Based in Pitampura, Delhi, Design Essentials works across Delhi NCR to create residential and commercial interiors with a balance of aesthetics, usability and site-level practicality.

story.title: Design is only successful when the finished space works in real life.
story.text: Our role is to connect ideas with execution. That means understanding how the space will be used, planning the technical details early, selecting materials carefully and coordinating the site so the final result remains faithful to the approved concept.
story.alt: Architectural home exterior and interior composition
story.note: Client-verified founder biography, awards, team size and project count should be added before production content is finalized.

values.title: Measured luxury
values.text: Premium does not mean loud. We use proportion, material and detail to create restraint and comfort.

values.title: Practical planning
values.text: Storage, lighting, ventilation, movement and maintenance are planned before the visual layer is finalised.

values.title: One accountable journey
values.text: Design, sourcing, site coordination and handover remain connected through one organised process.

belief.quote: A space should look considered, but feel completely natural to use.
belief.text: This is the principle behind every residential, commercial and renovation project.

seo.title: What We Do
seo.description: Residential, commercial, turnkey and renovation interior services across Delhi NCR.

hero.title: Interior design, planning and execution under one clear process.
hero.text: From homes and offices to restaurants, clinics and renovation projects, services are structured to help customers choose the right starting point.

cta.title: Tell us what space you are planning.
cta.text: The right service depends on property type, budget, timeline and how much execution support you need.
cta.label: Send Project Details

hero.text: Interior projects need structure. This page explains how the client journey stays clear from the first meeting to the final review.

feature.title: Good execution protects good design.
feature.text: Planning, sourcing and supervision should not be disconnected from the creative idea. The final website makes this strength visible.
